requirements.task_name: Save the earliest 4th-grade math club that ends by 4:30 PM and costs under $40/month
requirements.task_description: Use the after-school programs page to filter for 4th-grade math/science clubs that cost $40/month or less and end by 4:30 PM, then sort by start time and save the earliest qualifying program.

requirements.task_name: Plan 3 vegetarian, nut-free school lunches for the week of March 9
requirements.task_description: Use the lunch menu to filter for vegetarian and nut-free options for the week of March 9 and add lunch choices for exactly three different days to the meal planner.

requirements.task_name: Save the earliest bus route to Oak Street arriving before 7:45 AM
requirements.task_description: Find bus routes that serve Oak Street for elementary students, filter for buses arriving before 7:45 AM, sort by arrival time, and save the earliest route to your saved routes list.

requirements.task_name: Save two April evening events for 1st-grade families between 5–8 PM
requirements.task_description: Use the calendar to filter April events for 1st-grade families that start between 5:00 PM and 8:00 PM, then save the first two matching events to your saved events list.

requirements.task_name: Contact the most experienced 3rd-grade math teacher via the staff directory
requirements.task_description: Use the staff directory to filter for 3rd-grade math teachers, sort by years of experience, and send a message through the contact form to the teacher with the most years of experience.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark the 2nd-grade homework policy limiting nightly homework to 30 minutes
requirements.task_description: Navigate to the homework policies, filter for 2nd grade, go to the homework time guidelines section that states a 30-minute nightly limit, and bookmark that section for quick access later.

requirements.task_name: Create a 2nd-grade supply checklist with four optional items costing $5 or less
requirements.task_description: Open the 2nd-grade school supply list, show only optional items, sort them by estimated cost, and add the first four items that cost $5.00 or less to your supply checklist.

requirements.task_name: Submit an interest form for a July summer camp running 9 AM–3 PM under $150/week
requirements.task_description: Use the summer camp programs page to filter July sessions that run from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM and cost no more than $150 per week, then open the first matching session and submit an interest form with sample contact details.
